codeReview.summary: SqliteCheckpointStore implementation is correct and complete. All CheckpointStore trait methods are implemented: save, load, load_latest, list, and prune. The implementation correctly persists to SQLite, retrieves by ID, lists by task_id, and survives restarts. Two tests verify save/load roundtrip and load_latest ordering.

issues.description: serde_json::to_string uses unwrap() which could panic if checkpoint.state fails to serialize. While unlikely for TaskState, using ? or map_err would be more defensive.
serde_json::to_string uses unwrap() on checkpoint.snapshot which is serde_json::Value - should always succeed but unwrap is still risky.
row_to_checkpoint uses unwrap() on DateTime::with_timezone after parse_from_rfc3339. The parse should succeed since we control the format when saving, but defensive error handling would be better.

summary: The SqliteCheckpointStore implementation is correct and fully implements the CheckpointStore trait. Worker found the implementation already existed and verified it passes build, tests, and clippy checks. The only change made was fixing an unused import warning in the test module. No blocking issues found - minor unwrap() usage could be improved but are not blocking.
